-- We need to show that (g ∘ f) (x * y) = (g ∘ f) x * (g ∘ f) y
    -- (g ∘ f) (x * y) = g (f (x * y))
    -- Since f is a ring homomorphism, f (x * y) = f x * f y
    -- So g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y)
    -- Since g is a ring homomorphism, g (f x * f y) = g (f x) * g (f y)
    -- On the other hand, (g ∘ f) x * (g ∘ f) y = g (f x) * g (f y)
    -- Therefore, (g ∘ f) (x * y) = (g ∘ f) x * (g ∘ f) y
    simp [map_mul]
    all_goals try { tauto }
    all_goals try { aesop }
